title: cordia brunnea
intro: Cordia brunnea, also known as the brown woodbine or brown wood, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Borage family. Traditionally, it is used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cordia brunnea include treating fever, headaches, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used to make a tincture or an ointment.
